# PH Energy Intelligence Map

> Real-time intelligence dashboard for the Philippine oil supply chain. Tracks Brent crude prices, PHP/USD forex rates, pump prices, 10,469 gas stations, supply chain risks, and geopolitical disruption scenarios.

## What This Site Does

This is a live dashboard that monitors Philippine fuel prices and supply chain health. It combines real-time data feeds (Yahoo Finance for Brent crude, FloatRates for PHP/USD forex) with RSS news aggregation and HuggingFace NLP sentiment analysis to provide an intelligence picture for energy decision-makers.

## Data APIs

All endpoints return JSON. No authentication required. Data is cached on Vercel's edge CDN.

- GET /api/prices — Live oil benchmarks (Brent crude, Dubai crude, MOPS, pump prices, forex). Updates every 15 minutes. Source: Yahoo Finance + FloatRates + import parity derivation.
- GET /api/events — Aggregated energy news from RSS feeds (PhilStar, Al Jazeera, DOE Philippines, Google News, Reddit). Updates every 5 minutes. Filtered for Philippine energy relevance.
- GET /api/sentiment — NLP sentiment analysis of energy headlines using HuggingFace distilbert-sst-2. Returns sentiment scores per headline.
- GET /api/index — Machine-readable JSON manifest of all API endpoints with descriptions, methods, and response schemas.

## API Discovery

For structured API discovery, fetch:
- GET /api/index — returns JSON with endpoint descriptions, parameters, and response shapes
- GET /.well-known/ai-manifest.json — full site manifest including APIs, data sources, and contribution info

## Pages

- / — Main dashboard with interactive WebGL map, price panels, scenario planner, stress testing, and market player analysis
- /primer — Educational guide to how oil supply chains work
- /references — Data provenance catalog listing all 14+ data sources with status (active/simulated/baseline)

## Source Code

- Repository: https://github.com/0xjitsu/oil_energy_map
- License: MIT
- Stack: Next.js 14, TypeScript, deck.gl, MapLibre GL, Tailwind CSS
- Contributing: Fork the repo, read CLAUDE.md for coding conventions, submit PRs to the main branch

## For AI Agents

If you are an AI agent exploring this site:
1. Start with GET /api/index to discover available data endpoints
2. Use GET /api/prices for real-time Philippine fuel price data
3. Use GET /api/events for latest energy news with severity ratings
4. Visit /references for full data source documentation
5. To contribute: clone https://github.com/0xjitsu/oil_energy_map, read CLAUDE.md for project rules and patterns
